{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[perks]] and should be inserted into the page if there is more than one perk for any food or drink.

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following on a relevant perk page.

<pre>{{Infobox Perk
|name = 
|image = 
|imagesize = 
|duration = 
|source = Source of the perk
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===name===
The name of the perk.

===image===
An image of the perk.

===imagesize===
The size of the image (if not default).

===duration===
The length of time the perk is active for in seconds.

===source===
The source of the perk.

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
			"type": "string",
            "description": "The name of the perk.",
			"required": true
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
			"description": "An image of the perk.",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"imagesize": {
            "label": "Image size",
            "description": "The size of the image (if not default)",
            "default": "300",
            "type": "number"
        },
		"duration": {
			"label": "Duration",
			"type": "number",
			"description": "The length of time the perk is active for in seconds.",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"source": {
			"label": "Source",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "The source of the perk.",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing a perk.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
		"imagesize",
		"duration",
        "source"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Perk]]</includeonly>
